description: Installs OBS Studio via Chocolatey and/or syncs bundled settings. Supports 3 modes.

messages.notAdmin: This script requires admin privileges. Please run as Administrator.
messages.notFound: OBS Studio not found -- will install now
messages.settingsSkipped: No OBS settings bundle found in script folder -- skipping sync
messages.disabled: OBS Studio install is disabled in config

commands.install+settings: Install OBS Studio and sync settings (default)
commands.install-only: Install OBS Studio only (no settings sync)
